zh.lifeSummary: Katharina Bernd於大約1492年出生在德國爾特波格奧拉赤 斯圖特加特莫林根。她於大約1515年與Hans Andreas Wolff在德國貝也藍德可萊斯 庫瑟爾岡格洛夫結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Bernd
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Matthias, Otto.
German: from a shortened form of the personal name   Bernhard  . Compare   Berndt  .

variants.name: Bernhard
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Alfons, Detlef, Dieter, Erwin, Friedhelm, Fritz, Gerhard, Hertha, Horst, Kurt, Manfred, Otto.

German, Dutch, Danish, Swedish, Norwegian, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): from the ancient Germanic personal name Bernhard, composed of the elements ber(n) ‘bear’ + hard ‘brave, hardy, strong’. As a Jewish name, this is an adoption of the German name because it has the same beginning as the Jewish name Ber . The surname of German origin is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine). See also Bernard , compare Barnard , Barnhard , Barnhart , and Bernhardt .

variants.name: Berns
meanings: Dutch and German: patronymic from the personal name Bern, a variant of Bernd .
Latvian: from a short form of the personal name Bernards (see Bernard ).
Irish (Kildare): from the Gaelic personal name Ó Broin (see Byrne ).

nameMeanings.name: Katharina
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: Katharina Bernd was born about 1492, in Möhringen, Stuttgart, Württemberg, Germany. She married Hans Andreas Wolff about 1515, in Gangloff, Kusel, Bavaria, Germany. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters.

fr.lifeSummary: Katharina Bernd est née environ 1492, à Möhringen, Oberamt Stuttgart, Württemberg, Allemagne. Elle a épousé Hans Andreas Wolff environ 1515, à Gangloff, Landkreis Kusel, Bayern, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles.

de.lifeSummary: Katharina Bernd wurde um 1492 in Möhringen, Oberamt Stuttgart, Württemberg, Deutschland geboren. Sie hat um 1515 in Gangloff, Landkreis Kusel, Bayern, Deutschland Hans Andreas Wolff geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Katharina Bernd è nata il circa 1492 nel Möhringen, Oberamt Stuttgart, Württemberg, Germania. Lei sposato Hans Andreas Wolff circa 1515, nel Gangloff, Landkreis Kusel, Bayern, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie.

ja.MOEHRINGEN, WUERTTEMBERG, Germany: ドイツウuルッテンバーグオバーアムト ストゥットガートムohリンジェン
ja.lifeSummary: Katharina Berndは約1492年にドイツウuルッテンバーグオバーアムト ストゥットガートムohリンジェンで生まれた。約1515年にドイツバイエルンランドクレイス クセルガングロッフでHans Andreas Wolffと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Katharina Bernd(은)는 대략 1492년 독일 wu르테버그 오베램트 스투트가트 oh링에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1515년 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 쿠셀 갱글로프에서 Hans Andreas Wolff(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Katharina Bernd nasceu aproximadamente 1492, em Möhringen, Oberamt Stuttgart, Württemberg, Alemanha. Ela casou-se com Hans Andreas Wolff aproximadamente 1515, em Gangloff, Landkreis Kusel, Bayern, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas.

ru.lifeSummary: Katharina Bernd родилась около 1492 г. в местности мoхринген, обирамт стуттгарт, вuрттембирг, Германия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hans Andreas Wolff около 1515 г. в местности ганглофф, ландкрис кусел, беиирн, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери.

es.lifeSummary: Katharina Bernd nació aproximadamente 1492, en Möhringen, Oberamt Stuttgart, Württemberg, Alemania. Se casó con Hans Andreas Wolff aproximadamente 1515, en Gangloff, Landkreis Kusel, Bayern, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas.
